en: And the biggest, grossest, gnarliest rat I've ever seen in my life, eating the dog food, but it was funny because it was eating the dog food like...
I ran after this rat, like, I don't know what I was going to do if I caught it, but you know, you stupid rat.
Demi, name three ways you can make Camp Rock R-rated.
Demi, name three nicknames for a woman's private parts.
Oh my god, um, coochie. No, I'm sorry.
The reward for me is all in the work, and the reward for me is all in just it being something that moves you.
That's what's most important to me.
Um, who'd you share your first kiss with?
I think his name was Austin, I was at camp.
